name: Mistcliff Coast
summary: A rugged jungle coast of sea caves, cliffs, fog banks, wrecks and predator-haunted beaches south-west of Chult.
politics: Few formal powers hold the coast; captains, guides and hidden tribes matter more than law.
Smugglers and wreckers use the mist as cover.
culture: Survival knowledge, respect for storms and caution around ruins are essential.
Sailors treat the coast with superstition.
